name: whystack
description: WhyStack — an engineering learning platform that teaches why technologies exist.

scripts.//mobile: --dev-client, not Expo Go: Expo Go ships a fixed set of native modules compiled against SDK 54, and this project is SDK 57. It refuses to open the project at all.
scripts.//api:lan: 0.0.0.0, not localhost: a phone cannot reach the loopback interface. --urls is an ASP.NET Core argument, so this needs no cross-env and no extra dependency.
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm lint:design && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.verify:all: pnpm verify && pnpm api:format && pnpm api:test
